---
title: "Comments and Revisions Test"
author: "Test Author"
date: last-modified
format: docx
---

## Testing comments

This paragraph contains [a comment on this phrase]{.comment id="1"} to demonstrate the comment round-trip workflow.

Here is another paragraph with [multiple words]{.comment id="2"} that have a comment attached.

## Testing revisions (track changes)

This paragraph demonstrates insertions: [this text was added]{.ins id="rev_101"} by a reviewer.

This paragraph demonstrates deletions: [~~this text was removed~~]{.del id="rev_102"} by an editor.

Here is a paragraph with both [inserted content]{.ins id="rev_103"} and [~~deleted content~~]{.del id="rev_104"} in the same sentence.

## Mixed content

The committee [recommends]{.comment id="3"} that the [updated]{.ins id="rev_105"} guidelines be [~~immediately~~]{.del id="rev_106"} adopted [within the next quarter]{.ins id="rev_107"}.

## Normal content

This paragraph has no comments or revisions - it should render normally.

- Bullet point one
- Bullet point two
- Bullet point three
